standards.name: OneRoster
standards.plain_description: A standard way to exchange school roster, class, course, resource, and gradebook data.
standards.platform_role: Core K-12 rostering, resources, gradebook, REST and CSV exchange.

standards.name: Question and Test Interoperability
standards.plain_description: A standard way to package, move, and represent assessment questions, tests, and related assessment data.
standards.platform_role: Assessment package repository, metadata extraction, accessibility metadata, result interoperability.

standards.name: Competencies and Academic Standards Exchange
standards.plain_description: A standard way to publish and exchange academic standards, competencies, skills, rubrics, and related frameworks.
standards.platform_role: Canonical standards, competency, course-code, rubric, and alignment graph.

standards.name: Caliper Analytics
standards.plain_description: A standard vocabulary for describing learning activity events across tools and content.
standards.platform_role: Immutable learning event ingestion, profile projections, and privacy-safe activity analytics.

standards.name: Learning Tools Interoperability
standards.latest_public_status_found: LTI 1.3 Final and LTI Advantage services (AGS 2.0, NRPS 2.0, Deep Linking 2.0) Final; issued 2019-04-16.
standards.plain_description: A secure way to launch and connect external learning tools from a learning platform.
standards.platform_role: Tool launch, roles/membership, deep linking, assignment and grade services.

sources.title: LTI Assignment and Grade Services 2.0 specification
LTI Names and Role Provisioning Services 2.0 specification

standards.name: Security Framework
standards.plain_description: A shared 1EdTech security pattern based on OAuth 2.0, JWT, and OpenID Connect.
standards.platform_role: OAuth scopes, token validation, service authorization, and secure API patterns.

standards.name: Data Privacy
standards.plain_description: A rubric and certification program for reviewing how edtech apps handle privacy.
standards.platform_role: Privacy classifications, audit posture, data-sharing controls, and procurement trust language.

standards.name: Common Cartridge and Thin Common Cartridge
standards.latest_public_status_found: Common Cartridge 1.3 Final; Common Cartridge/Thin Common Cartridge 1.4 Candidate Final
standards.plain_description: A standard way to package, import, export, and link digital learning resources and assessments.
standards.platform_role: Content package import/export, metadata, QTI/LTI/CASE alignment.

standards.name: Open Badges
standards.latest_public_status_found: 3.0 Final Release, Document Version 1.4.3; issued 2026-04-22. Badge Connect API 2.1 remains relevant for Open Badges 2.0 ecosystems.
standards.plain_description: A standard way to issue, share, and verify a single achievement or credential.
standards.platform_role: Verifiable microcredentials, achievements, endorsements, and credential verification.

standards.name: Comprehensive Learner Record
standards.plain_description: A verifiable learner record that can bundle many achievements, skills, courses, and milestones.
standards.platform_role: Longitudinal learner record, transcript, and credential bundle support.

standards.name: Edu-API
standards.plain_description: A developing standard for exchange of higher education enterprise and teaching-and-learning data.
standards.platform_role: Future higher-ed expansion path beyond K-12 OneRoster.

standards.name: Data-SSML
standards.plain_description: A standard way to add machine-readable text-to-speech pronunciation instructions to QTI 3 and HTML content.
standards.platform_role: Accessibility metadata for assessment and learning content.

standards.name: Computer Adaptive Testing
standards.plain_description: A standard API pattern for test delivery platforms to communicate with adaptive testing engines.
standards.platform_role: Future adaptive assessment interoperability after QTI foundations.

standards.name: Uniform ID Framework
standards.plain_description: A did:web-based framework for consistent, verifiable identifiers in the 1EdTech ecosystem.
standards.platform_role: Future verifiable IDs for institutions, tools, credentials, courses, and content.

standards.name: TrustEd Apps Rubrics
standards.latest_public_status_found: Active rubrics for data privacy, accessibility, security practices, and generative AI data
standards.plain_description: Self-assessment tools that help schools and suppliers discuss trust, privacy, accessibility, security, and AI data practices.
standards.platform_role: Governance vocabulary for our platform and third-party apps built on it.
